message.subject: <\![CDATA[feat(world): extract WorldStateManager for time and bell state (#3)]]>
message.body:
<\![CDATA[- Add scripts/world/world_state_manager.gd with all day-timer, bell-state, and derived-fact logic (get_cycle_progress, get_current_hour, get_world_state, format_clock_time, set_time_to_hour, tick) - Main scene creates and owns WorldStateManager node; _process delegates tick(delta) so the main loop has no direct timing or bell mutation - Legacy NPC schedule and dev-time-jump paths preserved via manager API - Bell audio setup moved into WorldStateManager.setup_bell_audio()
Closes #3 ]]>
